name: stocky
description: Sistema POS completo con facturación electrónica, gestión de inventario y ventas
author: Tu Nombre <tu-email@ejemplo.com>

scripts.test:offline: node --test testing/closeOrderLocks.test.js testing/localOutboxEventsStore.test.js testing/offlineStockGuards.test.js testing/outboxMutationHandlers.test.js testing/outboxProcessorLocal.test.js testing/salesOutboxDedup.test.js testing/salesSnapshotSync.test.js testing/salesOutboxCandidates.test.js testing/salesOutboxRetryPolicy.test.js testing/salesOutboxTransitions.test.js
scripts.audit:perf:ci: node scripts/perf/run-week1-baseline.mjs --out-json testing/perf/perf-current.json --out-md docs/perf/PERF_CURRENT.md && node scripts/perf/check-week1-budget.mjs --current testing/perf/perf-current.json --budget testing/perf/perf-budget.json
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.predeploy: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run test:offline && npm run build
scripts.desktop:precheck: VITE_DESKTOP_BUILD=true npm run build && concurrently "npm run preview -- --port 4173" "wait-on http://localhost:4173 && ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:4173 electron ."
scripts.desktop:build: VITE_DESKTOP_BUILD=true npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable
scripts.desktop:build:x64: VITE_DESKTOP_BUILD=true npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64
scripts.desktop:build:arm64: VITE_DESKTOP_BUILD=true npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --arm64
scripts.desktop:build:all: VITE_DESKTOP_BUILD=true npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 --arm64
scripts.desktop:build:signed:x64: VITE_DESKTOP_BUILD=true npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 -c.forceCodeSigning=true
scripts.desktop:build:signed:arm64: VITE_DESKTOP_BUILD=true npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --arm64 -c.forceCodeSigning=true
scripts.desktop:build:signed:all: VITE_DESKTOP_BUILD=true npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64 --arm64 -c.forceCodeSigning=true
